summary: Five‑star rating praising the intact Good Lovin' track; recording source and quality not mentioned.
review: The reviewer awards five stars, mainly because the "Good Lovin'" performance is left whole rather than being broken into separate files. They also remark on a common practice from later‑era shows of treating Mickey Hart’s drum solo as its own track, but give no specific feedback on the audio fidelity or mix.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review highlights a strong show element (full Good Lovin') and raises no recording complaints, resulting in a high rating but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix balance, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer only mentions the desire to keep Good Lovin' unedited and notes drum‑solo track handling; no broader set‑list comments.

band_member_comments.Drums: Reviewer references Mickey Hart’s drum solo being isolated as a separate track on later shows.
